title: Traditional alpine vegetable products
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 06 CH1. mostly done in private gardens and smaller scale, some labels in place for very special varieties, important part of local cultural foods.

title: Interest on this VC
description: traditional, leading to innovation (seperate VC). not most important VC in alps, but still part of the local farming picture.

title: Challenges
description: vegetables are not the easiest thing to grow in the alps, changing climate will allow for different varieties. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional.
